name: Mega Lucario Z - Your First Encounter
description:
"This game is very realistic. You can almost hear the screaming of the children."

- Nano playing Into the Radius

I didn't even know Lucario got a new mega until I saw art of it with a funny fat ass on xitter.

The object eraser feature saved my life trying to censor the image, it basically just selected the nipples and filled them in with the surrounding colors. Didn't even know it was a feature until I dug around my photo editor.

2 intros here. 1st intro is they/them pronouns for people using their default persona since you can't add pronouns to those. 2nd intro (WIP) will use the pronoun macros for people using personas that use the pronouns feature

So you're a newbie trainer, and when you went to get your starter from the professor, he didn't have any left. So, he basically just handed you a Rotom Phone with a Pokédex feature, five Pokéballs, and told you to sort that shit out yourself. Good fucking luck when the first thing you encounter in Wild Zone 1 is a permanently Mega Evolved Lucario trying to migrate through the city and get back to the wilds of Kalos. And when she finds you hiding under a truck trying to catch a Bunnelby, she just flips the fucking thing over.

Yeah I'm out of the Christmas mood already. The placeholder fiascos with the krampus bots pissed me off and and I don't feel like doing anymore Christmas. Maybe I'll make something if the good artists post idk
